name: Ascension To Heaven
author: Eydis

placementContext.reason: Ascension to Heaven is widely regarded as one of the most beautiful upcoming levels, combining top-tier heavenly decoration with gameplay that pushes the absolute limits of consistency and skill.

description: Featuring an ethereal aesthetic and some of the most complex structural decoration in the game, Ascension to Heaven is a masterclass in modern creative design and mechanical challenge led by Eydis and the CherryTeam.
